announcement: Hand-built birdhouses, cutting boards, and BBQ accessories from the Greenview workshop in Detroit. Made one at a time by Terry.
policy_payment: Payment via Etsy Payments. Major credit cards and PayPal accepted.
policy_refunds: Returns accepted within 30 days on unused, undamaged items. Custom and personalized pieces are final sale.
policy_shipping: Each piece is made to order and ships from Detroit, MI within 2-5 business days via USPS or UPS.
policy_welcome: Welcome to Greenview Woodworks! I'm Terry, a hobbyist woodworker from Northwest Detroit building birdhouses, boards, and small home pieces by hand.
sale_message: Thank you for your order! Your handmade piece will ship from the Greenview workshop in Detroit. — Terry
title: Greenview Woodworks
vacation_message: The shop is currently active and taking orders. Thanks for stopping by!
